title: Latest F1 News
description: Don't miss a Formula 1 moment – with the latest news, videos, standings and results. Go behind the scenes and get analysis straight from the paddock.

items.title: Which football team does each Formula 1 driver support?
items.content: There are quite a few football fans in the Formula 1 paddock – but which team does each driver support?
items.contentSnippet: There are quite a few football fans in the Formula 1 paddock – but which team does each driver support?
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 在F1赛车场中，许多车手都是足球迷，但他们支持哪些球队？

items.title: Hamilton praises Ferrari for ‘moving mountains’ after Canada GP
items.content: Lewis Hamilton has expressed gratitude and satisfaction after putting together one of his strongest weekends with Ferrari since joining the team ahead of the 2025 season.
items.contentSnippet: Lewis Hamilton has expressed gratitude and satisfaction after putting together one of his strongest weekends with Ferrari since joining the team ahead of the 2025 season.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 勒克莱尔在加拿大大奖赛上表现出色，收获自2025赛季加入法拉利以来最佳表现，他对法拉利的努力表示赞赏。

items.title: Antonelli vows to ‘keep levelling up’ in title fight
items.content: Kimi Antonelli has made clear that he “can’t relax” despite moving 43 points clear of Mercedes team mate George Russell in the championship standings after the Canadian Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Kimi Antonelli has made clear that he “can’t relax” despite moving 43 points clear of Mercedes team mate George Russell in the championship standings after the Canadian Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 韩世俊在加拿大大奖赛后将积分领先梅赛德斯队友乔治·拉塞尔43分后表示，尽管领先，但他“不能放松”，仍将努力“继续提升”以争夺冠军。

items.title: Why Bearman is taking ‘belief’ from Antonelli vs Russell battle
items.content: Ollie Bearman has explained how the developing battle between Kimi Antonelli and George Russell is giving him extra belief and motivation, with the Haas driver eager to follow his former F2 team mate to front of the field.
items.contentSnippet: Ollie Bearman has explained how the developing battle between Kimi Antonelli and George Russell is giving him extra belief and motivation, with the Haas driver eager to follow his former F2 team mate to front of the field.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 奥利·贝尔曼表示，卡米·安东内利与乔治·拉塞尔之间的竞争正给他带来额外的信心和动力，这位哈斯车手渴望跟随前F2队友冲向领奖台。

items.title: From Hakkinen to Hamilton – 8 dramatic DNFs from the lead
items.content: After George Russell's sudden exit from the lead of the Canadian Grand Prix, F1.com looks back at eight other occasions where drivers were dramatically forced to retire whilst in P1.
items.contentSnippet: After George Russell's sudden exit from the lead of the Canadian Grand Prix, F1.com looks back at eight other occasions where drivers were dramatically forced to retire whilst in P1.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 文章回顾了八次赛车手在领跑时遭遇戏剧性退赛的案例，包括乔治·拉塞尔在加拿大大奖赛领跑时突然退赛的事件。这些案例展现了F1比赛中领跑时的突发状况和紧张时刻。

items.title: Otis Lawrence claims Sim Racing title in thrilling season finale
items.content: Welshman Otis Lawrence became the youngest ever Sim Racing World Champion on Thursday. Here's how the action played out in the final two rounds of the year.
items.contentSnippet: Welshman Otis Lawrence became the youngest ever Sim Racing World Champion on Thursday. Here's how the action played out in the final two rounds of the year.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 威尔士选手奥蒂斯·劳伦斯在周四成为史上最年轻的模拟赛车世界冠军。文章回顾了年度最后两轮比赛的激烈角逐过程。

items.title: Mercedes reveal exact cause of Russell’s Canada DNF
items.content: Mercedes have given an insight into what caused the power unit failure that put George Russell out of the Canadian Grand Prix.
items.contentSnippet: Mercedes have given an insight into what caused the power unit failure that put George Russell out of the Canadian Grand Prix.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 梅赛德斯车队解释了导致乔治·拉塞尔在加拿大大奖赛中退赛的动力单元故障原因。

items.title: Alonso outlines when Aston Martin expect performance step forward
items.content: After some further signs of progress for Aston Martin in Canada, Fernando Alonso has indicated when there might be a step forward in performance.
items.contentSnippet: After some further signs of progress for Aston Martin in Canada, Fernando Alonso has indicated when there might be a step forward in performance.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 阿隆索表示，在加拿大取得一些进展后，阿斯顿·马丁有望在性能上实现突破。

items.title: CATCH-UP: Watch the F1 Sim Racing World Championship season finale
items.content: Catch all the action from Round 12, which marks the finale of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship.
items.contentSnippet: Catch all the action from Round 12, which marks the finale of the 2026 F1 Sim Racing World Championship.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary:
文章标题：CATCH-UP: Watch the F1 Sim Racing World Championship season finale

摘要：
2026年F1模拟赛车世界锦标赛第12站比赛落下帷幕，这是本赛季的最终决赛。观众可以回顾整个赛季的精彩瞬间。

items.title: Newly-discovered species of wasp named after Piastri
items.content: McLaren's Oscar Piastri has received the unique honour of having a newly-discovered species of wasp named after him.
items.contentSnippet: McLaren's Oscar Piastri has received the unique honour of having a newly-discovered species of wasp named after him.
items.creator: Formula 1
items.summary: 梅赛德斯车手奥斯卡·皮亚斯特里（Oscar Piastri）因一项独特荣誉而闻名——一种新发现的黄蜂物种被命名为“Piastri”。这一命名是对其成就的认可。
